Results for 'top things to do and restaurants in Normandy' in Bayeux, Normandy, France:
1. Château La Chenevière [Apartment building] ⭐ 4.7 (391 reviews)
   📍 Commes
   "If you’re ever in Normandy, make this place a priority."
2. Château de Boutemont [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (944 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 11 AM
   📍 Château de Boutemont, 7 Chem. de Bouttemont
   "Discovered this on a visit to Normandy."
3. Normandie Luge, Site de loisirs Nature et Sensations, Luge sur rails, Accrobranches, Tyroliennes, Jardin, Minigolf [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (1100 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM
   📍 Les Trois Croix
   "Beautiful location, loads of activities, friendly staff and great food."
4. chambre d'hôtes Le Domaine de la Vallée [Restaurant] ⭐ 5.0 (80 reviews)
   📍 Basse-Normandie, 14 La Vallée
   "Comfortable quiet hotel in the Normandy countryside."
5. Le Restaurant Manoir du Lys [Haute French] ⭐ 4.9 (461 reviews) | €100+
   🕐 Closed · Opens 12:15 PM
   📍 La Croix Gautier
   "A truly special visit to one of the best restaurants in Normandy."
